Sender: Egyptian Antiquities Service (Ministry of Public Education)
Brief_Summary: This document is a purchase order (No. 462) issued by the Egyptian Antiquities Service to Ibrahim Morsi Establishment for the supply of transparent paper, based on a tender submitted on October 15, 1938. It also contains annotations regarding items from Baraize and sent invoices.
English_Translation:
Ministry of Public Education
Egyptian Antiquities Service

(Handwritten: Items supplied)
(Handwritten: From Baraize)
(Handwritten: According to invoices sent)
(Handwritten: For presentation to)
(Handwritten: Remarks)
(Handwritten: REMARKS)

Notice – This offer will not be accepted unless it is written.

Purchase Order No. (462)
Issued to Ibrahim Morsi Establishment for supplying the following items at an agreed price
at the price stated in the tender submitted by your establishment on 1938-10-15 (68)

Item Name | Unit | Quantity | Price | Remarks
| Pound | Milliemes |
(Handwritten: Transparent paper 4 x 4, length 5 m) | (Handwritten: number) | (Handwritten: 50) | (Handwritten: 40.) | (Pencil note: ✓)
(Handwritten: " 4 x 4) | (Handwritten: ") | (Handwritten: 50) | (Handwritten: 40.) |
(Handwritten: " 7 x 4) | (Handwritten: ") |
Stamps_and_Annotations: Handwritten: بموجب فواتير مرسلة (According to invoices sent)
Handwritten: لأجل عرضها على (For presentation to)
Confidence_Notes: The 'Document_Date' refers to the date of the tender submission, as no explicit issue date for the purchase order itself is present on the document.
Full_Transcription:
وزارة المعارف العمومية
مصلحة الآثار المصرية

[Handwritten Arabic: أصناف موردة]
[Handwritten Arabic: من براهي]
[Handwritten Arabic: بموجب فواتير مرسلة]
[Handwritten Arabic: لأجل عرضها على]
[Handwritten Arabic: ملاحظات]
[Handwritten Arabic: REMARKS]

تنبيه – لا يقبل هذا العطاء الا اذا كان مكتوبا

اذن مشترى رقم ( [Handwritten Arabic: ٤٦٢] )
صادر الى محل [Handwritten Arabic: ابراهيم مرسى] لتوريد الاصناف الآتية بسعر موافق
بالسعر الوارد بالمناقصة المقدمة من محلاتكم بتاريخ [Handwritten Arabic: ١٩٣٨/١٠/١٥] ( [Handwritten Arabic: ٦٨] )

الاسم الصنف | وحدة | عدد | السعر | ملاحظات
| جنيه | مليم |
[Handwritten Arabic: ورقة شفافة ٤ × ٤ طول ٥ م] | [Handwritten Arabic: عدد] | [Handwritten Arabic: ٥٠] | [Handwritten Arabic: ٤٠.] | [Pencil note: ✓]
[Handwritten Arabic: " ٤ × ٤] | [Handwritten Arabic: "] | [Handwritten Arabic: ٥٠] | [Handwritten Arabic: ٤٠.] |
[Handwritten Arabic: " ٧ × ٤] | [Handwritten Arabic: "] |
